name: atm-bank-finder-microservices
description: Real-time ATM and bank finder built with a microservices-style Node.js monorepo.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @atm-finder/frontend" "npm run dev -w @atm-finder/gateway" "npm run dev -w @atm-finder/places" "npm run dev -w @atm-finder/location" "npm run dev -w @atm-finder/realtime"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start -w @atm-finder/gateway" "npm run start -w @atm-finder/places" "npm run start -w @atm-finder/location" "npm run start -w @atm-finder/realtime"
